summary.rationale: Documentation deferrals are appropriate for follow-up story. Partial test deferral is justified by existing integration coverage.

deferral_analysis.deferral_reason: Documentation guidance for migration script authors

validation_results.feasibility_evidence: Documentation is post-implementation work; all migration components already specified

deferral_analysis.follow_up_action: Create STORY-079 (Documentation) - Migration Script Authoring Guide

deferral_justification.reason: Documentation deliverable, not blocking core functionality
deferral_justification.precedent: Other documentation stories (STORY-052, STORY-053, STORY-058) handled post-implementation
deferral_justification.timing: Can be created after implementation validates migration patterns
deferral_justification.impact: Low - users can implement migrations following code examples and existing patterns

deferral_analysis.deferral_reason: Documentation guide for troubleshooting failed upgrades

validation_results.feasibility_evidence: Documentation is post-implementation work; error handling implemented in AC#7

deferral_analysis.follow_up_action: Create STORY-079 or STORY-080 (Documentation) - Upgrade Troubleshooting Guide

deferral_justification.reason: Documentation deliverable, not blocking core functionality
deferral_justification.precedent: STORY-075 (Installation Reporting & Logging) - similar troubleshooting documentation
deferral_justification.timing: Can be created after implementation and testing identify common failure modes
deferral_justification.impact: Medium - important for user confidence but not blocking upgrade feature itself

deferral_analysis.deferral_reason: Documentation guide for managing backups (retention, cleanup, recovery)

validation_results.feasibility_evidence: Documentation is post-implementation work; backup lifecycle implemented in SVC-004, SVC-005, SVC-006, SVC-007

deferral_justification.reason: Documentation deliverable, not blocking core functionality
deferral_justification.precedent: STORY-048 (Production Cutover Documentation) handled operational guides post-implementation
deferral_justification.timing: Can be created after backup operations are tested and documented
deferral_justification.impact: Low-Medium - important for advanced usage but not blocking basic upgrade scenarios

deferral_analysis.status: PARTIAL - Integration tested, not isolated unit tests
deferral_analysis.deferral_reason: Backup functionality tested via UpgradeOrchestrator integration tests; BackupService reuses existing backup.py module

feasibility_evidence.existing_module: backup.py already exists with its own test suite
feasibility_evidence.integration_coverage: UpgradeOrchestrator integration tests cover all BackupService operations (create, restore, list)
feasibility_evidence.test_requirement_met: All test requirements in AC#1-#8 have corresponding test scenarios
feasibility_evidence.dependencies: Integration tests validate service contracts more thoroughly than unit tests alone would

deferral_analysis.follow_up_action: Document justification in Implementation Notes: 'Integration testing provides adequate coverage; isolated unit tests would be redundant given existing backup.py test suite'

deferral_justification.reason: Backup functionality reuses existing backup.py module which has its own tests
deferral_justification.precedent: STORY-074 (Comprehensive Error Handling) did not require duplicate unit tests when error handling was integrated
deferral_justification.coverage_evidence: Integration tests exercise all BackupService methods (SVC-004, SVC-005, SVC-006, SVC-007) through upgrade workflow
deferral_justification.impact: Low - integration testing provides more realistic coverage than isolated unit tests

circular_deferral_check.result: No items deferred to other stories; all deferrals are documentation or integration test coverage consolidation

prerequisite_stories.title: Version Detection & Compatibility Checking
prerequisite_stories.required_for: Version comparison to detect upgrade scenarios
prerequisite_stories.satisfaction: STORY-077 provides version.compare_versions() used in AC#1 upgrade detection

quality_assessment.documentation_scope: Appropriate - Three documentation items are scoped for follow-up story
quality_assessment.test_coverage: Adequate - Integration tests cover all service methods and business rules
quality_assessment.technical_feasibility: High - All components explicitly specified in technical specification

recommendations.primary: APPROVE deferrals - All documentation items can safely move to STORY-079
recommendations.condition_1: Ensure STORY-079 (Documentation) is created before STORY-078 moves to Released status
recommendations.condition_2: Update Implementation Notes with justification for BackupService partial test deferral

should_include: Migration script authoring guide (with code examples and patterns)
Upgrade troubleshooting guide (common failures and recovery)
Backup management guide (retention policy, cleanup, recovery procedures)

validation_summary.final_recommendation: APPROVE - All deferrals are valid and justified. No implementation blockers identified.
validation_summary.notes: Deferrals follow established pattern of documentation-as-follow-up (STORY-052, STORY-053, STORY-075, STORY-048). Integration testing strategy aligns with STORY-074 pattern. No architectural concerns.
